incomplete_sections: Q17 Costs and value for money
evidence_requirements: project finances and Project Impact basis

local_findings.finding: Existing IFS artifacts and prior no-unlock audits were found, including the live authenticated readback and board records. They confirm the same UK-Switzerland partner, budget, permit/export and finance gates.
Only general research/licence text was found. No named Swiss partner, partner budget, permit/export basis or UK-Switzerland finance document was found.
General AIRR, outreach, and accounting-system references were found. No route-unlocking UK-Switzerland partner or cost evidence was found.

google_drive_findings.finding: No direct Google Drive hit for the live IFS portal application number.

google_drive_findings.query: UK Switzerland / Innosuisse / Swiss partner / partner budget
google_drive_findings.finding: The Drive war-room sheet lists UK-Switzerland CR&D as open and states that a Swiss implementation partner and research institute are required. Its next action is still to build a target list; it does not evidence a committed partner, budget, permit/export position, or finance basis.
The operating log records UK-Switzerland as blocked by Swiss partner and research institute evidence. It does not include a later commitment, budget, or portal-ready declaration basis.

The PDF contains broad grant planning text and sensitive finance/admin fields. It is excluded from direct IFS use until independently verified and sanitised; it is not a UK-Switzerland partner commitment or eligible-cost schedule.
This is a Future Leaders pack, not UK-Switzerland CR&D evidence. It does not unlock the live 10210100 IFS draft.

Q4 Permits and licences.reason: No permit/licence position for the UK-Switzerland work package was found.

Q6 Export licence.reason: No export-control position for cross-border collaboration was found.

Q17 Costs and value for money.reason: No eligible-cost schedule, partner cost split, or value-for-money basis was found.

Finances summary.reason: Live IFS readback shows GBP0 totals and no validated finance basis was found.

Project impact.reason: Project Impact should not be submitted until finances and declarations are complete.

Award terms and conditions.reason: Award terms are a final authority step and remain blocked by incomplete evidence.

decision.why_not_now: The new local and Drive evidence pass found prior grant planning material and target lists, but not the committed partner, budget, permit/export, finance, Project Impact or award-terms evidence required to complete the live draft.
decision.next_operator_action: Keep application 10210100 open as a staged draft. Use the existing partner acquisition material to obtain Swiss partner/research institute commitment and eligible-cost evidence, then re-run this delta before editing IFS.

controls: Sensitive finance/admin material found in Drive was not copied into the IFS payload.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No Q4 permit/licence declaration was made.
No Q6 export-control declaration was made.
No cost, finance, Project Impact or award-terms field was completed.
No final IFS submission was attempted.
No email, contact form, partner invite or upload action was performed.
No password or runtime secret was written to this artifact.
